extractionMethod: Filtered national 2025 TIGER/Line county shapefile to GEOID=48339 and serialized selected feature to GeoJSON FeatureCollection.
coordinateReferenceNote: Source shapefile .prj declares geographic coordinates; output GeoJSON coordinates are longitude/latitude.
licensingPublicDomainPosture: U.S. Census Bureau TIGER/Line data is generally public data; verify source documentation during repository acceptance.
